scene.message: Ayase: Ehh! Baldy Hannya as{nl} Principal? So not okay!{waitkey}{ret}
V.P. Hannya: What?! You're{nl} being noisy! Later!!{waitkey}{ret}
Pinch V.P. Hannya?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Pinch Principal Oishi?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
V.P. Hannya: Wh-what?{waitkey}{ret}
Principal Oishi: Oh, my?{waitkey}{ret}
Principal Oishi: Now, run{nl} along over there.{waitkey}{ret}
